title: hieracium pallidum subsp. comosulum
intro: Hieracium pallidum subsp. comosulum, also known as the yellow hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium pallidum subsp. comosulum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, and can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
